response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No lyrics reference was provided, so manual transcription was performed. 2. JSON Usage: Ignored the null reference lyrics and transcribed the sparse vocal cues in the instrumental track and the dialogue segment manually. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed vocal bursts precisely during the long instrumental section, and maintained strict dialog-to-audio synchronization during the final 3D scene.

subtitles.original: どうしたんですか、ラプラスさん。
次の生誕ライブ、なんにもやることないんですけど！！
subtitles.english: I have absolutely nothing to do for my next birthday live concert!!

subtitles.original: 毎年いろいろやってきたけど...
subtitles.english: I've done various things every year, but...

subtitles.original: 去年はミームやりすぎて、ミームキャラになっちゃったし、どうしよう！
subtitles.english: last year I did too many memes and became a meme character, so what should I do?!

subtitles.original: デビュー当時のアイドルらしさは もう見る影もないですからね。
subtitles.english: After all, there's no trace left of the idol-like quality you had when you debuted.
